steps.t: Stáli the Hewer's luggage can be found upstairs in Zarkul-sulûn.
Stáli the Hewer has returned to Zarkul-sulûn.
Stáli the Hewer has returned to Zarkul-sulûn, and he holds Eskil's contract out for your study.

Eskil Bloodthumb stands on the upper level of Zarkul-sulûn, looking resigned to his fate.
Fastrith Hawkfeast stands on the upper level of Zarkul-sulûn, seeking to gain your attention.
Stáli the Hewer is on the upper level of Zarkul-sulûn.
Prince Durin is on the lower level of Zarkul-sulûn.
